ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pay_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the pay grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pay grade */,
  "min_hourly_rate" TEXT /* Minimum hourly rate for the pay grade */,
  "max_hourly_rate" TEXT /* Maximum hourly rate for the pay grade */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the pay grade became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay step */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the pay step */,
  "hourly_rate" TEXT /* Hourly rate for the pay step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pay step */,
  "min_experience_years" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the step */,
  "max_experience_years" INTEGER /* Maximum years of experience for the step */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the pay step became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pay grade of the employee */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pay step of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's department */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's supervisor */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated */,
  "last_promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the last promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES pay_steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES pay_grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_sheets" (
  "time_sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time sheet */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "work_date" TEXT /* Date of work */,
  "hours_worked" TEXT /* Number of hours worked */,
  "overtime_hours" TEXT /* Number of overtime hours worked */,
  "overtime_rate" TEXT /* Rate for overtime hours */,
  "special_pay" TEXT /* Special pay adjustments */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the supervisor who approved the time sheet */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the time sheet was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_sheets_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "pay_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the pay period */,
  "pay_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the pay period */,
  "gross_pay" TEXT /* Gross pay for the period */,
  "net_pay" TEXT /* Net pay after deductions */,
  "overtime_pay" TEXT /* Total overtime pay for the pay period */,
  "special_pay" TEXT /* Total special pay for the pay period */,
  "taxes" TEXT /* Total taxes deducted */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Total benefits deducted */,
  "other_deductions" TEXT /* Other deductions */,
  "total_deductions" TEXT /* Total deductions from the gross pay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pay grade */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pay step */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the position became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES pay_steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES pay_grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_grade_progressions" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progression record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "old_grade_id" INTEGER /* Old pay grade */,
  "new_grade_id" INTEGER /* New pay grade */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the progression became effective */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the progression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pay_grade_progressions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pay_adjustments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* ID of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit became effective */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit was terminated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)
